The Gunners made it to their first final in this competition since 2006 thanks to a 2-1 semi-final victory over Atletico Madrid, with Bukayo Saka scoring the winner in the second leg at the Emirates. PSG beat Bayern Munich 6-5 across two epic encounters to reach their second successive Champions League final. The French club are looking to become the first back-to-back winners of the competition since Real Madrid won three titles in a row between 2016 and 2018.

TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.subtitle: Northampton Saints v Gloucester Rugby
TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.description: Northampton Saints v Gloucester Rugby (Kick-off 3.00pm). Coverage of the match from cinch Stadium at Franklin's Gardens. These two sides last met in a thrilling encounter in the reverse fixture back in early October that saw nine tries scored across the 80 minutes. The Saints raced into a 31-7 lead at half-time thanks to four first-half tries, before they held off a Northampton fightback in the second period to win 37-35.

At this stage last year in the men's singles event, eventual runner-up Jannik Sinner beat Andrey Rublev 6-1, 6-3, 6-4 to progress, while 2025 winner Carlos Alcaraz beat Benjamin Shelton 7-6, 6-3, 4-6, 6-4. Other players to make it through to the quarter-finals 12 months ago include American Tommy Paul, Lorenzo Musetti and Novak Djokovic, who beat Great Britain's Cameron Norrie in straight sets.

TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.title: Live MLB
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.subtitle: Phillies @ Dodgers
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.description: Los Angeles Dodgers v Philadelphia Phillies (Start-time 9.10pm). Coverage of the National League match from Dodger Stadium. These two sides last met in the National League Divisional Series back in early October, a series that saw the Dodgers progress thanks to a 3-1 series victory. Los Angeles won the first two games 5-3 and 4-3 in Philadelphia, before the Phillies won game three 8-2. The hosts then won the fourth contest 2-1 to move onto a Championship series against Milwaukee Brewers.

TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.subtitle: Day 9-Day Session
TNT.Sports.4.HD.uk.description: Coverage from around the courts on day nine of the Grand Slam tournament at Stade Roland Garros in Paris, featuring fourth-round matches. America's Coco Gauff won the women's singles title a year ago thanks to a 7-6, 2-6, 4-6 victory over Belarus' Aryna Sabalenka in the final. Gauff beat the likes of Lois Boisson, Ekaterina Alexandrova and fellow American Madison Keys to reach the showpiece, while Sabalenka beat Iga Swiatek, Elina Svitolina and Amanda Anisimova to set up the clash with Gauff.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Parthenope
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The beautiful Parthenope searches for love in the heady, hot summers and endless nights of her youth in Naples, Italy, as she falls for the city's many unforgettable characters and finds herself in the adventures that make up a lifetime.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Moonlight
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Rachel
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Miss You, Love You
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A blunt, grieving widow is forced to plan her husband's funeral with a total stranger: her estranged son's assistant.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Battle of the Sexes
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Joker
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. Once there, he meets a surprising ally (Maya Kay) who helps him hatch a scheme to sabotage the shady developer's plans.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spring Breakers
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: While We're Young
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Black Adam
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Dark Wizard
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Death Consequence
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Dean Potter finds joy and escape through his early success at extreme climbing, where he connects with a community of like-minded people seeking the sport's freedom and adrenaline; Dean's restless energy compels him to pioneer new ascents and forge new world records, even while at times falling afoul of the establishment and struggling with personal relationships.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Dark Wizard
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Dying to Flying
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Dark Wizard
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: This is Art, This is Spirituality
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The rivalry between Dean and Alex Honnold intensifies as both climbers vie to be the first to free solo a route on the 3000-foot El Capitan; as Dean's mental state deteriorates, he alienates his inner circle and accepts a dangerous career opportunity in China.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Dark Wizard
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Transcending Human Limitations
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With a new relationship grounding him, Dean regains emotional stability and his long-held dream of flight comes to fruition when he immerses himself in the cutting-edge world of wingsuit flying.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Every generation, a portal opens up between the Outerworld and Earth. Emperor Shao Kahn (Brian Thompson), ruler of the mythical Outerworld, pounces the moment the portal reopens and slips through with his mighty warriors, intent on total domination and uniting the two worlds. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. In the meantime, opposition grows and warriors Sonya Blade (Sandra Hess), Jax (Lynn "Red" Williams), Kitana (Talisa Soto) and Liu Kang (Robin Shou) get ready for war.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: X-Men: First Class
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Warfare
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: One Battle After Another
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Meg 2: The Trench
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Shape of Water
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Color Purple
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Torn apart from her sister and her children, Celie faces many hardships in life, including an abusive husband. With support from a sultry singer named Shug Avery, as well as her stand-her-ground stepdaughter, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days

However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Get Him to the Greek

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Zola

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

NBC.East.Stream.us2.title: Open House
NBC.East.Stream.us2.description: Buying a house can be a stressful, time-consuming process, which is why people turn to shows such as "Open House" to get help in the real estate market. Hosts Sara Gore and George Oliphant (who also rescues homeowners' renovation projects on sister show "George to the Rescue," which began as a segment of "Open House" before becoming a stand-alone show) showcase some of the hottest homes on the market in major cities, get interior design tips from experts and provide information on what people need to know about stylish living.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Fugitive

Pursuing him is a team of U.S. marshals led by Deputy Samuel Gerard, a determined detective who will not rest until Richard is captured. As Richard leads the team through a series of intricate chases, he discovers the secrets behind his wife's death and struggles to expose the killer before it is too late.

He joins her at a holiday party in the headquarters of the Japanese-owned business she works for. But the festivities are interrupted by a group of terrorists who take over the exclusive high-rise, and everyone in it. Very soon McClane realizes that there's no one to save the hostages -- but him.

Hot on their trail is Charissa Sosa, who was once involved with a member of Smith's team and has sworn to capture them, no matter what it takes.

While Han and Leia escape in the Millennium Falcon, Luke travels to Dagobah in search of Yoda. He is called back into action, however, when a cryptic terrorist (Jeremy Irons) takes New York City hostage in a lethal game of "Simon Says" and refuses to speak with anyone but McClane. Teaming up with a street-savvy electrician named Zeus Carver (Samuel L. Jackson), McClane dashes through the city, trying to stay one step ahead of a murderous plot.

AMC.HD.us2.description: After more than 30 years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators, Pete "Maverick" Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him. Training a detachment of graduates for a special assignment, Maverick must confront the ghosts of his past and his deepest fears, culminating in a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice from those who choose to fly it.

Milo considers the job an easy payday, but Nicole quickly escapes to chase a lead on a murder case. The former spouses play an escalating game of one-upmanship, until they suddenly find themselves on the run for their lives.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Fool's Gold

When he finds a vital clue that may finally pinpoint the treasure's whereabouts, he drags Tess and her boss, billionaire Nigel Honeycutt, along on the hunt. But Finn is not the only one interested in the gold; his former mentor-turned-enemy Moe Fitch (Ray Winstone) will stop at nothing to beat him to it.

AMC.HD.us2.title: 50 First Dates
AMC.HD.us2.description: Playboy vet Henry sets his heart on romancing Lucy, but she has short-term memory loss. She can't remember anything that happened the day before. So every morning, Henry has to woo her again. Her friends and family are very protective and Henry must convince them that he's in it for love.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Just Go With It
AMC.HD.us2.description: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Danny's problems, the lies create more trouble.

AMC.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Vinny

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Audacity
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Granfalloon
AMC.HD.us2.description: Crises hit the Winter Forum and Winter Gala, grotesquely held in adjacent ballrooms; P.I.N.A.T.A. squares off against the ethics-tinted Hypergnosis; the youth face actual human problems; Xander, like an actual human, understands his true nature.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Just Go With It
AMC.HD.us2.description: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Danny's problems, the lies create more trouble.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: False Alarms
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Stooges work as firefighters; they constantly get in trouble and are warned that one more incident will cost them their jobs; they try to avoid being fired by their exasperated chief.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Boobs in Arms
AMC.HD.us2.description: The boys unwittingly enlist in the Army.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
AMC.HD.us2.description: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

AMC.HD.us2.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
AMC.HD.us2.description: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Aging Brain
AMC.HD.us2.description: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
AMC.HD.us2.description: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
AMC.HD.us2.description: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

AMC.HD.us2.title: An Aetna Medicare Advantage plan might be right for you
AMC.HD.us2.description: When it comes to Medicare coverage, there are a lot of options. Learn about your choices so that you can select the coverage that's right for you. Call to speak with a licensed Aetna agent today.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Booby Dupes
AMC.HD.us2.description: The boys decide they are the world's best fishermen.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Fright Night
AMC.HD.us2.description: Frightened promoters fix a fight.

AMC.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Vinny
AMC.HD.us2.description: New York lawyer Vinny has never won a case. When his teenage cousin Bill and his friend Stan are accused of murder in a backwater Alabama town, it's up to the nervous Vinny to save him from jail, even though he's only ever tried personal injury cases before, and none of them successfully.

AMC.HD.us2.title: 50 First Dates
AMC.HD.us2.description: Playboy vet Henry sets his heart on romancing Lucy, but she has short-term memory loss. She can't remember anything that happened the day before. So every morning, Henry has to woo her again. Her friends and family are very protective and Henry must convince them that he's in it for love.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ghostbusters
AMC.HD.us2.description: After the members of a team of scientists (Harold Ramis, Dan Aykroyd, Bill Murray) lose their cushy positions at a university in New York City, they decide to become "ghostbusters" to wage a high-tech battle with the supernatural for money. They stumble upon a gateway to another dimension, a doorway that will release evil upon the city. The Ghostbusters must now save New York from complete destruction.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ghostbusters II
AMC.HD.us2.description: After saving New York City from a ghost attack, the Ghostbusters -- a team of spirit exterminators -- is disbanded for demolishing parts of the city during the battle. But when Ghostbuster Peter Venkman learns that spirits have taken an interest in his son, the men launch a rogue ghost-chasing mission. The quest quickly goes awry, landing them in court. But when the ghosts turn on the judge, he issues an order allowing the Ghostbusters to get back to work.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Mummy Returns
AMC.HD.us2.description: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Man on Fire
AMC.HD.us2.description: In a Mexico City wracked by a recent wave of kidnappings, ex-CIA operative John Creasy (Denzel Washington) reluctantly accepts a job as a bodyguard for 9-year-old Lupita (Dakota Fanning), the daughter of wealthy businessman Samuel Ramos (Marc Anthony). Just as Creasy begins to develop a fondness for the young girl, a bloodthirsty gunman (Jesús Ochoa) kidnaps her. Now, Creasy must pick off a succession of corrupt cops and criminals to reach his ultimate object of vengeance.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hija de migrantes intenta quitarse de encima ese estigma y elimina su lengua natal, el español. En otro caso, Favo y Tormento son raperos y se enfrentan por la letra de una canción.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Pedro quiere internar a su hermano en el manicomio por poner su vida en peligro para ganar un premio Darwin. Raquel pide el divorcio, su esposo enfrentará a su amante en un duelo medieval.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Me quiero casar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Una joven americana, de turista en México, se enamora de un joven mexicano, y a ambos le esperan muchas aventuras.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alfonso demanda a su esposa, ella se cree productora y quiere que los hijos sean grandes artistas. Exige orden de alejamiento contra la dueña de un restaurante donde dejó una mala opinión.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los hermanos abogados
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Edna y Héctor quieren dar un tiro perfecto para duplicar los premios que logren sacar de la jaula. Teresa y Gilberto compiten como jardineros en una prueba para ganar una cocina integral.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Un impulso explosivo; Mi útero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: José Ángel le dispara al perro de su vecina, ella pide compensación, él alega que fue en defensa propia. Venda un ovario y años después se entera de que en la cirugía le extirparon el útero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El autista destacado; Fuga con consecuencia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La acusan de convertir a su hijo en un señor mayor que viste de traje y corbata, y habla como adulto. Hacen un intercambio profesional, pero a él lo retienen en Cuba cuando ella huye a EE.UU.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La plancha; Amor eléctrico
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Pide la custodia de sus hijos porque el padre les exige hacer las tareas del hogar, lo que provoca constantes accidentes. Su esposa le induce erecciones usando electricidad en los genitales.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tráfico de órganos vivos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Deysi descubre que su esposo Roger estuvo involucrado en el asesinato de su hermano, quien fue secuestrado y despojado de sus órganos. Él asegura que la guerrilla colombiana lo obligó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No me salen las cuentas, pero voy a ser papá
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juan duda de su paternidad, discute con su novia Nohemí y la corre de casa. Él cree que el bebé que viene en camino no es su hijo. La mamá de Juan apoya a Nohemí, convencida de que será abuela.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío al límite
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me da asco el trabajo de mi hijo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Teresa no aprueba que su hijo sea masajista de hombres, pero él le asegura que es su pasión y que no va a cambiar de oficio para complacerla o evitar que se sienta avergonzada ante los demás.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Jalisco nunca pierde
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Una joven muy bella arrolla con su caballo a un hombre, él la sigue para reclamarle, pero al verla se enamora de ella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Al salir en libertad, Diana le pide a Ceci que le dé la propiedad que tienen en común porque cumplió prisión por su culpa. Fidel le promete a Lorena que en tres meses triplicaría la inversión.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Angélica demanda a Linda por daños al salir de su spa con cuatro cejas y quemaduras. Cher acusa a Jonathan de drogar a su mascota, un lémur, que se puso agresiva y le sacó un ojo a la dueña.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Como México No Hay Dos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un humilde campesino demuestra su talento como cantante y logra convertirse en una estrella de la música, pero no saber cómo sobrellevar tanto éxito lo conduce a un inesperado desenlace.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Teresa deja que Rubí le extraiga su menstruación con una aspiradora para acortar el ciclo, pero no imagina que esa sangre se vende por internet. Incumple un contrato por una buena causa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Béisbol MLB
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tercer juego de la serie regular de la MLB 2026. Chicago Cubs visita a St. Louis Cardinals. Desde el Busch Stadium, en St. Louis, Misuri.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: El rey de los tahures
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un joven es testigo del asesinato de su padre y años más tarde se convierte en un tahúr obsesionado con encontrar al homicida. Finalmente, el destino pone a ambos hombres en el mismo camino.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Estafa en el crucero; Fanática de las cirugías
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Su esposo estafa al usar un crucero como excusa para sacar dinero en tierra y en el mar. Graba sus cirugías y sube los videos a YouTube, así consigue anunciantes, aunque no necesita operarse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Se lanza del carro por una rabieta y provoca una tragedia. La condenan a pagar una indemnización por la golpiza que propinó y ella le exige a su pareja que la pague porque le salvó la vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Canción del alma
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rodrigo y su novia Adela se mudan a la capital para que él realice su sueño de ser un artista. La pareja deberá enfrentar nuevas tentaciones que la vida les pondrá en su camino.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Te di una oportunidad y no la aprovechaste
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alicia está desesperada y amenaza con divorciarse si su esposo no consigue trabajo. Afirma que le ha ofrecido oportunidades laborales a través de sus contactos, pero él se niega a aceptarlas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Recién nacido drogadicto; Samaris, la cangreja
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El bebé de Katty tiene síndrome de abstinencia por la adicción de su madre, por eso el padre quiere la custodia. Camila se siente víctima de una feminista y la demanda por 50 mil dólares.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hermana de incesto; El cáncer golpea la conciencia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Catherine fue adoptada y se casa con su padre sin saberlo, ahora quiere desalojar a sus hermanas. Laura tiene cáncer y pide que los abuelos cuiden a su hija, pero el padre quiere la custodia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La novia tristre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cristina llega feliz al día de su boda, pero el novio es asesinado antes de entrar a la iglesia. Ella se siente culpable por la muerte de Pablo y su suegra insiste en hacer su vida más difícil.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tormento
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel no puede superar la pérdida de su nieto Rodrigo y vive atormentado por la culpa hasta que Diego llega a su vida. La necesidad de Daniel de volver a ser abuelo lo lleva a tomar la peor decisión.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una segunda oportunidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Carla necesita un trasplante de corazón. Su esposo sufre y pide por un milagro para que ella pueda ver crecer a sus hijos y hará lo posible para conseguir un donante.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: ¿A qué hora regresa mi mamá?
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Esther se ve obligada a dejar a su hija Macrina en casa de Cata y su esposo, sin imaginar que ellos la maltratan. Por una confusión la madre termina tras las rejas, pero sus vecinos la apoyan.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amelia: Nadie va a hacerte daño
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras sufrir la sorpresiva muerte de su madre, Amelia queda tan afectada que se obsesiona con cuidar la salud de su bebé. Lo extremo de sus medidas confirma que padece una psicosis postparto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Diego al descubierto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mientras Diego organiza el plan de captura de Circe, ella enfrenta su mayor pesadilla. Se quita la venda de los ojos y jura venganza contra el amor de su vida. Williams da con Isabel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Un regalo para Iker
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dante y Rosa llegan muy animados a jugar por una recámara infantil para su hijo. Arturo y Ángel van por un automóvil, deben tener conocimientos culinarios para poder avanzar en el juego.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El padrino
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Patricio, un narcisista que no acepta su edad ni sus responsabilidades, enfrenta el momento de rendir cuentas cuando debe resolver una situación que ha evadido durante mucho tiempo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Te di una oportunidad y no la aprovechaste
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alicia está desesperada y amenaza con divorciarse si su esposo no consigue trabajo. Afirma que le ha ofrecido oportunidades laborales a través de sus contactos, pero él se niega a aceptarlas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mientras yo rezaba, vació la casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En medio de la cremación de su madre, Monse acusa a su hermana de saquear las pertenencias sin respetar la herencia. Asegura que no ayudó con los gastos del funeral ni acudió a despedirse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tentaciones ocultas; Transgénero engañando
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Michelle está embarazada de Juan, pero al descubrir que son hermanos, él quiere que aborte, ella se niega por no estar bien de salud. Su pareja muere y ella se adueña de todos los bienes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: También soy su padre; Veneno vaginal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jesús quiere la custodia compartida de su hija, pero Sandra, la madre, se niega rotundamente. En otro caso, Yadira es una mujer madura que tiene sexo con el joven Adrián, él se obsesiona.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Le endulza el odio para dejarme en la calle
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El contraataque
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Diego está a punto de hacer justicia por la muerte de su hermano y entregar a la culpable, pero la Mami Chula tiene otro plan en mente que cambia el rumbo del operativo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cirugía o muerte; Marcados como ganado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El padre de José tiene una lesión cerebral severa y hay que operarlo, pero su esposa no da la autorización. Además, Nicole entra en la organización de Blas y termina como esclava sexual.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cien años de perdón; Lucha por mi privacidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Chapman ayudó a Juan a salir de la calle, ahora pide que le pague 67 mil dólares por daños y perjuicios. Yuly quiere emanciparse de su mamá y que además corra con sus gastos, porque la espía.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de diosas de la mitología griega
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dispuestos a atraparlas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los concursantes participan para encontrar a la pareja ideal ¿Se alinearán los astros a su favor?

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Como caído del cielo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Flora se pone su vestido de novia y espera por Arturo, pero esa experiencia marca su vida. Una milagrosa confusión hace que Gustavo llegue a su vida para hacerla creer de nuevo en el amor.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mientras yo rezaba, vació la casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En medio de la cremación de su madre, Monse acusa a su hermana de saquear las pertenencias sin respetar la herencia. Asegura que no ayudó con los gastos del funeral ni acudió a despedirse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lo diferente no es malo; Preñada del engaño
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La familia de un hombre niega que haya sido homosexual y pelea su herencia con la pareja gay del difunto. Irving descubre que el hijo de su esposa no es suyo y quiere anular el matrimonio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El arma; Factura del pasado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un padre quiere internar a su hijo por su obsesión con las armas. Jay no puede entrar a su casa porque su víctima compró la vivienda contigua y tiene orden de alejamiento, la cual pide anular.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vivir por ella
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Después de pasar 20 años en la cárcel por un crimen que no cometió, Perla sale libre y lo único que desea es recuperar a su hija, que está en manos de la mujer que la condenó por celos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La señora de la casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras estar 20 años en la cárcel por un crimen que no cometió, Perla sale libre. Ahora, lo único que desea es recuperar a su hija, quien está en manos de la mujer que la condenó por celos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una luz en el abismo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El mundo de una madre se derrumba cuando su marido muere y ella se queda sola con sus dos hijos pequeños. Isabel vuelve a encontrar el amor en Marcelo, pero él no es el príncipe que ella pensaba.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A nadie le importa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Amaranta sufre tras el suicidio de su papá y su novio la introduce en el alcohol y las drogas. Angélica, su mamá, decide llevarla a terapia, así descubre que estuvo a punto de arruinar su vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mónica y Nancy: Dos anhelos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mónica, una modelo, y Nancy, maestra de inglés, comparten el proceso de lucha contra el cáncer de mama. Cuando Mónica descubre su valor y fortaleza, se convierte en vocera de las sobrevivientes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El contraataque
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Diego está a punto de hacer justicia por la muerte de su hermano y entregar a la culpable, pero la Mami Chula tiene otro plan en mente que cambia el rumbo del operativo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Conquistando a Rafa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Las hermanas Leticia y Araceli llegan dispuestas a enamorar a Rafa y llevarse todos los premios de la jaula. Daniel y Daniela demuestran sus conocimientos para ganar una cocina integral.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Desaparecida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tamara debe enfrentar una situación que dejó una marca en alguien, algo que ella consideraba una travesura adolescente. En medio de su desesperación, descubre algo que la hace tomar conciencia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Fingió sus embarazos para sacarme dinero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Javier, un hombre casado, se arrepiente de haberse enamorado de Luz, quien se convirtió en su amante y le aseguró en tres ocasiones que estaba embarazada para recibir beneficios económicos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Trans boxeadora asesina; Viviendo en camión de grooming
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Yandi le exige compensación al organizador de la pelea donde murió su esposa, quien enfrentó a una transexual. Susy vive en un camión de grooming desde que Gerardo, su novio, se casó con otra.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tráfico de órganos vivos; Chofer 420
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Deysi descubre que su esposo es el asesino de su hermano, a quien le sacaron los órganos. Tábata pierde su empleo como taxista porque tenía alergia y su pasajera la acusó de estar drogada.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Diego contra Circe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Después del fracasado operativo de captura, Diego y Circe se quitan las caretas. Los dos se cantan las verdades y cualquiera puede perder la vida. La farsa de Gavino sale a la luz.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Favores geriátricos; No más cruces para Cruz
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Miguel cree que su mujer ejerce la prostitución con los amigos de su abuelo. Netsy apoya que su hija defienda a Nikolas Cruz, autor de la masacre en Parkland, y que reúna dinero para su causa.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LALIGA TV BAR
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: LaLiga TV Bar.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Valencia-Barcelona
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Especiales LaLiga EA Sports fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Previo UEFA Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: PSG-Arsenal
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Espacio que se emite antes del comienzo de una nueva jornada de la Champions League. En él se repasa la actualidad de los equipos españoles que participan en la competición y se hacen previas de todos los partidos que se disputan durante la semana.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: PSG-Arsenal
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La máxima competición del deporte europeo garantiza emoción y buen fútbol. 36 equipos se juegan el pase a la gloria durante una fase liga antes de llegar a las eliminatorias, en las que los partidos son a cara de perro. El PSG defiende título.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Post UEFA Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: PSG-Arsenal
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza los partidos con las mejores imágenes, intenta esclarecer las polémicas y da la palabra a los que han sido los protagonistas sobre el césped.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Cultural - Burgos
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Cultural y Deportiva Leonesa quiere hacerse fuerte en casa desde el control del ritmo y la amplitud, buscando ventajas en tres cuartos sin perder equilibrio en la pérdida. Burgos CF intentará sostener un partido largo y competitivo en la categoría: orden, ayudas constantes y castigo en transición o estrategia cuando encuentre ventaja. Los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Málaga - Racing
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La Rosaleda acoge un pulso de alta exigencia: el Málaga quiere sostener su candidatura en la zona alta desde la intensidad y la presión tras pérdida, con llegada por bandas. El Racing llega con el objetivo de mantenerse arriba y administrar momentos: si gana segundas jugadas y domina el área, tendrá ventaja. Partido de márgenes mínimos, con estrategia como llave.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Las Palmas - Zaragoza
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Las Palmas afronta la jornada con ambición en la zona alta: control con balón, paciencia y aceleración en el último tercio para convertir el Gran Canaria en impulso. El Zaragoza, con la permanencia como hoja de ruta, necesita un partido sobrio y eficaz: proteger su área, competir rechaces y elegir bien los momentos para salir. En un duelo así, el primer golpe cambia el escenario.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Sporting - Almería
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: El Molinón empuja: el Sporting quiere iniciativa, presión alta por tramos y carga del área desde los costados para convertir el empuje en ocasiones. El Almería llega con ambición de zona alta: ritmo por dentro, llegadas constantes y atención a la transición defensiva. Si gana las áreas, puede marcar diferencias.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Cádiz - Leganés
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Nuevo Mirandilla pide oficio: el Cádiz buscará un partido de control emocional, sin concesiones, y con centros tensos para vivir cerca del área rival. El Leganés necesita puntuar en la pelea por la permanencia: bloque junto, área protegida y máxima atención a los rechaces. Si sostiene el 0-0, podrá crecer con estrategia y transiciones.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Previa Segunda División
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Multigol jornada 42
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Toda la información previa a los partidos que se van a disputar en la siguiente jornada de competición. Noticias, estadísticas, análisis y los datos necesarios para disfrutar más de los encuentros.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Multigol jornada 42
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La igualdad es la nota imperante en LaLiga HyperMotion, la Segunda División de fútbol español. Muchos son los aspirantes al ascenso, bien en busca de las dos plazas directas o por la vía del emocionante playoff con el que culmina la campaña. Una competición de primera.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Previa Segunda División
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Leganés - Mirandés
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Toda la información previa a los partidos que se van a disputar en la siguiente jornada de competición. Noticias, estadísticas, análisis y los datos necesarios para disfrutar más de los encuentros.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Leganés - Mirandés
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Butarque cierra el curso con un partido de tensión, de los que se juegan con la grada en pie y el corazón en la garganta. Leganés y Mirandés llegan con objetivos claros y urgencias distintas, en un escenario que suele premiar al equipo que se atreve.En clave permanencia, el Leganés necesita puntuar para no depender de terceros y evitar un vuelco inesperado en la zona roja. El Mirandés, todavía con vida, está obligado a ganar y esperar un tropiezo ajeno para mantenerse en la categoría. Noventa minutos con calculadora, radio y finales en paralelo.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Valladolid - Deportivo
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Zorrilla invita a un duelo de ritmo y control: el Valladolid buscará continuidad con balón y profundidad desde banda para sumar sin conceder transiciones. El Dépor, instalado en la zona alta, intentará imponer mando con amplitud y último pase; si convierte su dominio en remates claros y gana el balón parado, puede inclinar el partido.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Liga Profesional
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: CA River Plate – Belgrano (Finale)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Vorhang auf zur höchsten Spielklasse des argentinischen Fußballs: Die Primera División wurde 1985 als Nachfolger des Campeonato de Primera División und des Torneo Metropolitano gegründet. 24 Vereine sind in der Liga vertreten. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Argentinien! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Liga Profesional Apertura (Meisterspezial)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Fußball aus der ganzen Welt mit allen Höhepunkten aus den internationalen Top-Ligen. In dieser Ausgebe von "scooore" werden die spektakulärsten und wichtigsten Szenen aus der höchsten Argentinischen Fußball-Liga gezeigt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Campeonato Brasileiro
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Gremio – Corinthians (18. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Brasilianer spielen den attraktivsten Fußball. Will man die Pelés von morgen sehen, lohnt sich ein Blick auf die nationale Meisterschaft. Die Sendung zeigt die wichtigsten Spiele der aktuellen Saison. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Testspiel
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Internationales Freundschaftsspiel
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Testspiele, bzw. Freundschaftsspiele sind sportliche Spielpaarungen, die in keine offizielle Wertung einfließen. Die Begegnungen dienen oft zur Vorbereitung einer Saison oder werden während der Winterpause ausgetragen. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Im Rampenlicht – Footballs Greatest Stage
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Just Fontaine
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Große Turniere wie Welt- und Europameisterschaften, aber auch die Champions League oder der UEFA-Cup sind ideale Bühnen, auf denen sich Fußballspieler einen Namen machen, und ihren Marktwert steigern können. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Flamengo

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 328: Chimaev vs. Strickland - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Two titles are on the line when UFC returns to Prudential Center in Newark, New Jersey on Saturday, May 10 for UFC 328. In the main event, undefeated champion Khamzat Chimaev defends the middleweight title for the first time since winning it last August in a clash with former titleholder Sean Strickland. In the co-main event, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title against Japanese contender Tatsuro “The Best” Taira in the first UFC championship fight between competitors born in the 21st century.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Allen vs. Costa - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The action returns to Meta APEX in Las Vegas on May 17 with a fight card topped by a featherweight clash between “Almighty” Arnold Allen and Melquizael “The Dalmatian” Costa. A staple in the Top 10 aiming to defend his ground, Allen looks to rebound after a narrow decision loss to Jean Silva at UFC 324 and display the form that produced 10 straight wins to open his UFC tenure. One of the hottest fighters on the roster, Costa pushed his winning streak to six in February with a first-round stoppage win over veteran Dan Ige.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Song vs. Figueiredo - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC makes its fifth appearance in Macau, China and second at Galaxy Arena on Saturday, May 30 with a Fight Night event headlined by “The Kung Fu Kid” Song Yadong facing off with Deiveson “Deus da Guerra” Figueiredo. Still just 28 years old, the Chinese standout Song has won each of his last three main event assignments while amassing an 11-4-1 record inside the Octagon with wins over Marlon “Chito” Vera,  Marlon Moraes, and Henry Cejudo. A two-time UFC flyweight titleholder, Figueiredo has been a Top 10  mainstay since moving to bantamweight, facing a non-stop slate of tough competition including former champ Cody Garbrandt, current champ Petr Yan, and perennial contenders like Vera, Cory Sandhagen, and Umar Nurmagomedov.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Song vs. Figueiredo - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC makes its fifth appearance in Macau, China and second at Galaxy Arena on Saturday, May 30 with a Fight Night event headlined by “The Kung Fu Kid” Song Yadong facing off with Deiveson “Deus da Guerra” Figueiredo. Still just 28 years old, the Chinese standout Song has won each of his last three main event assignments while amassing an 11-4-1 record inside the Octagon with wins over Marlon “Chito” Vera,  Marlon Moraes, and Henry Cejudo. A two-time UFC flyweight titleholder, Figueiredo has been a Top 10  mainstay since moving to bantamweight, facing a non-stop slate of tough competition including former champ Cody Garbrandt, current champ Petr Yan, and perennial contenders like Vera, Cory Sandhagen, and Umar Nurmagomedov.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 328: Chimaev vs. Strickland - Main
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Two titles are on the line when UFC returns to Prudential Center in Newark, New Jersey on Saturday, May 10 for UFC 328. In the main event, undefeated champion Khamzat Chimaev defends the middleweight title for the first time since winning it last August in a clash with former titleholder Sean Strickland. In the co-main event, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title against Japanese contender Tatsuro “The Best” Taira in the first UFC championship fight between competitors born in the 21st century.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: TM ISTAF World Cup 2026 - SEMI-FINALS 1 - MALAYSIA vs INDONESIA  - (TEAM)
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: The ISTAF Sepaktakraw World Cup 2026 marks the official return of the Sepaktakraw World Cup to Malaysia, reaffirming the nation’s historic and enduring role in the global development of the sport. This prestigious championship will be held from 16 to 23 May 2026 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 319: Du Plessis vs Chimaev
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns to  Chicago with a stacked card featuring one of the most highly anticipated middleweight title fights in years, as South African champion Dricus Du Plessis faces his toughest test to date against unbeaten challenger Khamzat Chimaev. Plus a whole lot more action on UFC Reloaded
